gap_summaries.title: Task 6 test code references undefined _parse_review_result helper
gap_summaries.resolution: Extracted Task 6 tests into standalone tests/test_check_test_review.py with full imports and _parse_review_result helper

gap_summaries.title: Task 10 does not update _EXPECTED_IDS, _EXPECTED_CATEGORIES, and collector count in test_core_collectors.py
gap_summaries.resolution: Added explicit instructions to update _EXPECTED_IDS (+4 IDs), _EXPECTED_CATEGORIES (+2 categories), and test_collector_count (39 -> 43)

gap_summaries.title: burn_in_check.py per-run timeout hardcoded at 300s
gap_summaries.resolution: Added --timeout CLI flag to burn_in_check.py, and updated _burn_in_cmd to derive per_run_timeout from profile.timeouts.test_quality / burn_in_runs

gap_summaries.title: Task 5 references test_review_check.py before Task 6 creates it
gap_summaries.resolution: Added dependency note in Task 6 explaining implementors should create test_review_check.py before running Task 5's test suite

gap_summaries.title: Task 6 tests embedded inline in test_collectors_test_quality.py missing imports
gap_summaries.resolution: Moved to standalone test file tests/test_check_test_review.py with all needed imports; updated File Structure and Task 12 accordingly

gap_summaries.title: Evidence metrics not populated by production subprocess flow
gap_summaries.detail: run_collector_with_timeout creates evidence with metrics={} -- check script stdout metrics never flow into evidence.metrics. Existing rules (correctness, security, license) follow the same pattern: rule tests hand-craft evidence with metrics, production flow works via status only. Pre-existing architecture limitation, not M13-specific.
gap_summaries.mitigation: Consistent with existing architecture; no M13 fix needed

gap_summaries.title: Burn-in collector hardcodes pytest as test command
gap_summaries.detail: _burn_in_cmd uses 'pytest --tb=short -q' as the default test command. The profile toolchain could specify a different test runner.
gap_summaries.mitigation: Acceptable for M13; the check script accepts any command after '--', so the collector cmd builder is the only coupling point. Future enhancement can read toolchain.

gap_summaries.title: Mutation collector does not pass changed files for diff-scoping
gap_summaries.detail: Spec says 'mutation score >= threshold on changed code (sampled/budgeted)' but _mutmut_cmd does not receive changed files from DiffScope. mutation_check.py accepts optional changed_files arg but it's never populated.
gap_summaries.mitigation: The collector CmdBuilder signature is (checkout, profile) -- no DiffScope access. Wiring DiffScope into collector build_cmd would require M4 framework changes. Deferred to follow-up.

gap_summaries.title: os.chmod in test helper is Unix-only
gap_summaries.detail: tests/test_check_burn_in.py uses os.chmod with stat.S_IEXEC which is a no-op on Windows. Tests pass on Linux/WSL/macOS.
gap_summaries.mitigation: Test files invoke scripts via sys.executable (python3 <script>), so execute permission is not strictly needed.

gap_summaries.title: JUnit XML glob patterns may match non-JUnit files in deep checkouts
gap_summaries.detail: _find_junit_xmls uses recursive glob with patterns like **/junit*.xml which could match unrelated XML files.
gap_summaries.mitigation: _parse_junit_tests gracefully handles non-JUnit XML (returns empty dict), so false matches are harmless.

gap_summaries.title: Recursive glob in _find_junit_xmls could be slow on large checkouts
gap_summaries.detail: glob.glob with recursive=True walks the entire checkout tree. For large projects this adds latency per burn-in run.
gap_summaries.mitigation: Burn-in runs against a collector_checkout (fresh clone at specific SHA), which is typically small.

gap_summaries.title: Burn-in collector test command not configurable via profile toolchain
gap_summaries.detail: Future enhancement: read test runner from profile.toolchain[language] to support non-pytest test suites (vitest, jest, cargo test, etc.).

gap_summaries.title: Mutation collector diff-scoping via DiffScope integration
gap_summaries.detail: Future enhancement: pass DiffScope changed files to mutation_check.py --paths-to-mutate for targeted mutation testing on changed code only.
